ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the text source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the text source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text sample */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text source this sample belongs to */,
  "peer_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the peer or source from which the text sample comes */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* The actual content of the text sample */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the text sample was uploaded */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text sample */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_samples_peer_id FOREIGN KEY ("peer_id") REFERENCES peers ("peer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_samples_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES text_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peers" (
  "peer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each peer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or name of the peer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the peer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample these metrics relate to */,
  "average_sentence_length" REAL /* Average length of sentences in the text sample */,
  "average_word_length" REAL /* Average length of words in the text sample */,
  "flesch_reading_ease" REAL /* Flesch Reading Ease score for the text sample */,
  "noun_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of nouns in the text sample */,
  "pronoun_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of pronouns in the text sample */,
  "verb_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of verbs in the text sample */,
  "adjective_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of adjectives in the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "normalized_metrics" (
  "norm_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for normalized metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding metrics entry */,
  "average_sentence_length_normalized" REAL /* Normalized average sentence length */,
  "average_word_length_normalized" REAL /* Normalized average word length */,
  "flesch_reading_ease_normalized" REAL /* Normalized Flesch Reading Ease score */,
  "noun_ratio_normalized" REAL /* Normalized ratio of nouns */,
  "pronoun_ratio_normalized" REAL /* Normalized ratio of pronouns */,
  "verb_ratio_normalized" REAL /* Normalized ratio of verbs */,
  "adjective_ratio_normalized" REAL /* Normalized ratio of adjectives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("norm_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_normalized_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the word distribution entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample these counts relate to */,
  "noun_count" INTEGER /* Count of nouns in the text sample */,
  "pronoun_count" INTEGER /* Count of pronouns in the text sample */,
  "proper_noun_count" INTEGER /* Count of proper nouns in the text sample */,
  "unique_proper_noun_count" INTEGER /* Count of unique proper nouns in the text sample */,
  "verb_count" INTEGER /* Count of verbs in the text sample */,
  "adjective_count" INTEGER /* Count of adjectives in the text sample */,
  "adverb_count" INTEGER /* Count of adverbs in the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_distribution_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variation_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the variation index entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample these indices relate to */,
  "word_variation_index" REAL /* Calculated word variation index */,
  "word_variation_index_normalized" REAL /* Normalized word variation index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variation_index_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, linguist, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text sample */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the text sample */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when this version was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_sample_versions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample this category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., academic, social media) */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Subcategory name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_categories_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_metrics_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text sample these metrics relate to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metrics entry */,
  "date_calculated" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were calculated */,
  "calculated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who calculated the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_metrics_history_calculated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calculated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_metrics_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_metrics_history_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_analysis_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being requested for analysis */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis requested (e.g., sentiment analysis, topic modeling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_analysis_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_analysis_requests_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being collaborated on */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaboration this participant belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., owner, contributor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_participants_collaboration_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
